title: MERCURIO for High-Stakes Decisions
title_es: MERCURIO para decisiones de alto riesgo
subtitle: Mixture-of-Experts analysis across Mental, Physical, and Spiritual planes.
subtitle_es: Analisis de mezcla de expertos a traves de los planos Mental, Fisico y Espiritual.
description: Five modules built from the live MERCURIO agent definition, the moe invocation command, and the three plane playbooks. You will run three-plane analysis, pick a convergence method, calibrate confidence thresholds, choose the right panel of experts, then ship your own decision document.
description_es: Cinco modulos construidos desde la definicion viva del agente MERCURIO, el comando de invocacion moe y los tres manuales de plano. Vas a ejecutar analisis en tres planos, elegir un metodo de convergencia, calibrar los umbrales de confianza, escoger el panel adecuado de expertos y finalmente publicar tu propio documento de decision.

modules_planned.title: Three-Plane Analysis
modules_planned.teaser: Mental, Physical, Spiritual: read the real agent definition that splits every decision into three lenses.
modules_planned.teaser_es: Mental, Fisico, Espiritual: lee la definicion real del agente que separa toda decision en tres lentes.

modules_planned.title: Four Convergence Methods
modules_planned.teaser: Weighted voting, consensus, Delphi, dialectical synthesis: pick the right one for your decision shape.
modules_planned.teaser_es: Votacion ponderada, consenso, Delphi, sintesis dialectica: escoge el adecuado segun la forma de tu decision.

modules_planned.title: Confidence Thresholds
modules_planned.teaser: Six bands from 'execute now' (90%+) to 'halt and gather data' (<50%): calibrate yours before you commit.
modules_planned.teaser_es: Seis bandas desde 'ejecuta ya' (90%+) hasta 'detente y recopila datos' (<50%): calibra la tuya antes de comprometerte.

modules_planned.title: Expert Selection
modules_planned.teaser: Three to seven diverse agents with domain-weighted votes: the real playbook for assembling your panel.
modules_planned.teaser_es: De tres a siete agentes diversos con votos ponderados por dominio: el manual real para armar tu panel.

modules_planned.title: Ship Your Own Decision
modules_planned.teaser: Frame a real decision you owe, run the full MoE loop, publish the convergence doc with a confidence score.
modules_planned.teaser_es: Plantea una decision real que te toca tomar, ejecuta el bucle MoE completo y publica el documento de convergencia con una puntuacion de confianza.
